D1 Optics L3 Apply Atom

Wavefront Velocity in a Denser Medium

tune the refractive index and watch wavelength shorten while frequency stays fixed

Light's phase velocity drops by n in a denser medium; the frequency stays unchanged, so the wavelength must shorten in proportion.

Slide n. Wavefronts on the right slow down and crowd together; the bottom calipers show the wavelength change while frequency stays constant.
